name: Moravian Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a mixture of butter and lard for the shortening.
2. Sift the flour and spices together. Add sugar and mix well.
3. Work in the shortening with your fingertips or a pastry blender.
4. Add baking soda and molasses, and mix thoroughly.
5. Chill the dough.
6. Roll the dough very thin on a floured board and cut with fancy cookie cutters.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
